prompt: A photorealistic photo of a stunning young Korean adult East Asian woman in her twenties, with long reddish-brown hair, gentle smile, wearing a fitted light pale green short-sleeved mini-dress, sitting with legs crossed and hands on top a dark wooden table, looking directly at the camera with a subtle smile. She is in a modern indoor setting with large windows overlooking a city night view, with warm ambient lighting and reflections of city lights. Realistic, high-resolution, detailed, medium shot, sharp focus, 8k resolution

promptZh: 一张写实风格的照片，主角是一位令人惊艳的 20 多岁韩国年轻东亚女性，留着红棕色长发，面带温柔微笑，身穿 修身浅淡绿色短袖迷你裙，双腿交叠坐在深色木桌前，双手放在桌面上，直视镜头并露出微妙的微笑。她身处 带有大型落地窗、可俯瞰城市夜景的现代室内环境 中，周围环绕着温暖的环境光和城市灯光的倒影。写实、高分辨率、细节丰富、中景、焦点清晰、8k 分辨率
